color.description: Semantic foreground color token, or a raw CSS var reference.

flag.description: Set `true` to look up from the flag icon set instead of the system icon set.

label.description: Accessible label. Sets `role="img"` and `aria-label`. Omit for decorative icons.

name.description: Name of the system icon (e.g. `"Gear"`, `"ArrowRight"`) or flag (e.g. `"US"`)

size.description: Iconography size token. Maps to `--dimension-iconography-{size}`. Default `md` = 20 px.

color.description: Semantic foreground color token, or a raw CSS var reference.

flag.description: Set `true` to look up from the flag icon set instead of the system icon set.

label.description: Accessible label. Sets `role="img"` and `aria-label`. Omit for decorative icons.

name.description: Name of the system icon (e.g. `"Gear"`, `"ArrowRight"`) or flag (e.g. `"US"`)

size.description: Iconography size token. Maps to `--dimension-iconography-{size}`. Default `md` = 20 px.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
